attributes.readMe:
## Popover Playground

A config explorer for `<Popover>`. Every exported axis union is a `BoxelSelect` across the top, so you can mix any combination and watch a live `<Popover>` preview plus the generated invocation update together.

The preview body is crafted per `kind`, mirroring how the popover docs describe each: `details` is a read-only info view, `edit` is a BoxelSelect + input editor (the yellow editor surface), and `tools` is a dark action menu. Escalating with the corner glyph swaps between them.

This is the **teaching example** for the Popover API — the printed invocation panel is the authoritative reference for how to call `<Popover>` for any combination of axes.
attributes.cardDescription: A live config explorer for <Popover> — every axis is a control, with a live preview and the generated invocation shown side by side. The teaching example for the Popover API.
